About Alert Sprinkler Co., Inc.

Alert Sprinkler was established in 1977 and incorporated in 1978. We have been serving New Jersey and southeastern Pennsylvania for over 45 years. The scope of our work includes engineering, design, installation, and reinforcement of fire sprinkler systems. We also perform inspections, tests, repairs, and maintenance of sprinkler systems.

Licensing & Credentials

  • Fully insured and licensed by the State of New Jersey
  • NJ License: #P01629
  • NJ Fire Safety Certification in Fire Sprinkler Systems and Portable Fire Extinguishers
  • Certification: #195457

Our Workforce

We are a union company and all employees have been through a 5-year apprentice program to guarantee that their skills meet requirements in the field. We have been fortunate to have had the same core of fitters for the last 25+ years. We place a high value on employee loyalty — it enables us to give our customers the best possible service.
